mapper.sql: id, parent_id, name, code, sort_order, description, icon, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM yx_knowledge_category WHERE is_deleted = FALSE
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM yx_knowledge_category WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yx_knowledge_category (parent_id, name, code, sort_order, description, icon, status) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{sortOrder}, #{description}, #{icon}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE yx_knowledge_category SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, code = #{code}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, description = #{description}, icon = #{icon}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_knowledge_category SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
